criteria.question: Is there a complete YAML frontmatter block starting and ending with '---' containing 'description', 'difficulty', and 'tags'?
Does it avoid common AI hallucination/fluff phrases (outside of quoted examples)?
criteria.regex: (?<!")(?<!')(?<!Remove )(certainly!|(?:^|\. )it is worth noting|(?:^|\. )delve into|(?:^|\. )however, it is important|(?:^|\. )it's important to note|(?:^|\. )in conclusion,|(?:^|\. )as an ai|(?:^|\. )it should be noted)(?!["’'])

criteria.question: Does it have a distinct Red Team or Offensive Operations section?
Does it have a distinct Blue Team or Defensive Operations section?
Does it include concrete code blocks/payloads in markdown (```) format?
Does it provide a strict remediation or mitigation strategy?
Does it include Elite / Top 1% Hunter chained strategies or OPSEC advice?
Is there a step-by-step reproduction methodology?
Does it mention the CVSS vector, score, or standard severity level?
Does it conclude with a References section with at least one URL?
